chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1373 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 31-10-2023 Syed Hajan Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned AAG has filed statements on behalf of respondents No.3 to 5 and submits that alleged detenue has been recovered; hence this petition has served its purpose. This fact is confirmed by counsel for the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
